mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gamedb.map_npc WHERE stage = #{stage}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM gamedb.map_npc WHERE stage = #{stage} AND x = #{x} AND z = #{z}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gamedb.map_npc (stage, x, y, z, idnpc, angle, description, respawn) VALUES (#{stage}, #{x}, #{y}, #{z}, #{idnpc}, #{angle}, #{description}, #{respawn})
mapper.update: UPDATE gamedb.map_npc SET x = #{x}, y = #{y}, z = #{z} WHERE idnpc = (SELECT id FROM gamedb.npc_list WHERE name = #{npcName}) AND stage = #{stage}
UPDATE gamedb.map_npc SET angle = #{angle} WHERE idnpc = (SELECT id FROM gamedb.npc_list WHERE name = #{npcName}) AND stage = #{stage}
